image:image.image:caption: Broken speckled eggshell resting on fresh garden mulch in an Alabama garden.
image:image.image:title: After the Hatch

image:image.image:caption: Cahaba River winding through dense green forest at Cahaba River National Wildlife Refuge in Alabama.
image:image.image:title: The Ancient Path

image:image.image:caption: Great Blue Heron standing on a fallen pine over emerald water at Lake Purdy, Alabama.
image:image.image:title: The Wading Hour

image:image.image:caption: White milkweed flowers with star-shaped florets blooming in the green understory at Cahaba River National Wildlife Refuge, Alabama.
image:image.image:title: The Monarch Contract

image:image.image:caption: Cocktail in a coupe glass at Stäge Kitchen & Bar in Peachtree Corners, Georgia, photographed with shallow focus and warm interior light.
image:image.image:title: The Coupe

image:image.image:caption: Looking down into the Hyatt Regency San Francisco atrium at Charles O. Perry's Eclipse sculpture, with geometric balconies and lobby levels surrounding it.
image:image.image:title: Geometric Core

image:image.image:caption: Tunnel View panorama of Yosemite Valley with El Capitan, Half Dome, Bridalveil Fall, deep blue sky, and aircraft contrails.
image:image.image:title: Cathedral of the High Sierra

image:image.image:caption: Perfect reflection of Yosemite Valley granite cliffs in still Merced River water with autumn foliage.
image:image.image:title: Mirror of the Merced

image:image.image:caption: Twilight view of the Coachella Valley from Mount San Jacinto, with city lights forming a grid below the dark desert basin.
image:image.image:title: The Valley Below

image:image.image:caption: A massive quartz monzogranite boulder formation in Joshua Tree National Park, with rounded blocks, vertical fissures, and desert scrub at its base.
image:image.image:title: The Stacked Stone

image:image.image:caption: A lone Joshua tree in Joshua Tree National Park with a desert raven perched near the top, set against a clear Mojave sky.
image:image.image:title: The Raven and the Joshua Tree

image:image.image:caption: North American P-51D Mustang Man O' War resting in an open hangar at the Palm Springs Air Museum with desert mountains beyond.
image:image.image:title: The Warbird's Shadow

image:image.image:caption: Small Little Bambino watermelon growing among vines and serrated leaves in an Alabama garden.
image:image.image:title: Little Bambino

image:image.image:caption: Rattlesnake pole bean pods with purple streaking climbing a bamboo stake in an Alabama garden.
image:image.image:title: The Rattlesnake Climb

image:image.image:caption: Moss-covered petrified redwood trunk called The Queen at The Petrified Forest in Calistoga, California.
image:image.image:title: The Queen

image:image.image:caption: Coastal bluff, rocky shoreline, and Pacific surf at Duncan's Landing in Sonoma Coast State Park, California.
image:image.image:title: Duncan's Landing

image:image.image:caption: Goat Rock Beach on the Sonoma Coast, with Pacific surf, a broad sandy shoreline, and rocky headlands near the mouth of the Russian River.
image:image.image:title: Goat Rock Beach

image:image.image:caption: Tropical resort landscape at the Fairmont Orchid on Hawaii Island during blue hour, with palms, volcanic rock, water, and warm sunset color.
image:image.image:title: Blue Hour at the Orchid

image:image.image:caption: Fresh tropical fruit, including a sliced pink guava, displayed at Hilo Farmers Market on Hawaii Island.
image:image.image:title: Hilo Farmers Market

image:image.image:caption: Railroad tracks curving through green Alabama woods at sunset.
image:image.image:title: The Last Light on the Line

image:image.image:caption: Macro photograph of spherical rain droplets clinging to the spines and surface of a thistle leaf after morning rain in an Alabama garden.
image:image.image:title: The Thistle and the Rain

image:image.image:caption: A dense pile of mixed scrap metal, including a bicycle wheel, a frying pan, conduit, and wire, at a recycling yard in North Birmingham, Alabama.
image:image.image:title: North Birmingham Iron

image:image.image:caption: Plumeria blossoms with yellow centers and pink-edged petals covered in rain droplets at McBryde & Allerton Garden on Kauai.
image:image.image:title: Plumeria After Rain

image:image.image:caption: Cadillac Series 62 Convertible passing beneath the blue Santa Monica Pier archway in Santa Monica, California, with clear coastal sky above the Route 66 landmark.
image:image.image:title: End of the Road
